title: Deadshot.io
description: Deadshot.io is a fast-paced multiplayer FPS browser game with stunning 3D graphics and intense competitive gameplay. Battle players worldwide in multiple game modes, customize your loadout, and climb the leaderboard in this action-packed online shooter.
howToPlay: Use WASD to move, mouse to aim and shoot, R to reload, Shift to sprint, and Space to jump. Choose your weapon loadout before each match. Eliminate enemies to score points and climb the leaderboard.
tips: Aim for headshots to deal maximum damage and eliminate enemies faster
Use cover and peek around corners rather than running into the open
Customize your loadout to match your playstyle - try different weapon combinations
Stay mobile - strafing while shooting makes you harder to hit

faq.question: Is Deadshot.io free to play?
faq.answer: Yes, Deadshot.io is completely free to play in your web browser. No download or registration required.

faq.question: Can I play Deadshot.io on mobile?
faq.answer: Deadshot.io is optimized for desktop browsers with mouse and keyboard controls for the best FPS experience.

faq.question: What game modes does Deadshot.io have?
faq.answer: Deadshot.io offers multiple game modes including Free For All, Team Deathmatch, and other competitive modes with different maps.

faq.question: How do I get better at Deadshot.io?
faq.answer: Practice your aim in deathmatch, learn map layouts for positioning advantages, and experiment with different weapon loadouts to find what suits your playstyle.

title: Escape Road

Collect nitro boosts for extra speed
Avoid head-on collisions - they slow you down significantly
Learn the city layout to plan your escape routes

title: Agar.io
description: Agar.io is the original .io game that started it all. Control a small cell, eat pellets to grow, and consume smaller players while avoiding larger ones. Simple to learn, impossible to master.
howToPlay: Move your mouse to steer your cell. Eat smaller cells and pellets to grow. Avoid larger cells that can eat you. Split with Space to attack or escape.
tips: Start by eating pellets to grow to a safe size
Use the split mechanic (Space) to catch smaller players
Eject mass (W) to feed allies or bait enemies
Stay near the edges when small to avoid larger players

faq.question: How do I get big in Agar.io?

title: Moto X3M
description: Moto X3M is a thrilling motorcycle obstacle course game. Race through increasingly dangerous tracks, perform backflips, and try to complete each level as fast as possible. With dozens of levels, the fun never stops.
howToPlay: Use the up arrow to accelerate, down to brake. Lean forward/backward with left/right arrows. Perform flips for time bonuses!
tips: Backflips reduce your completion time
Don't over-accelerate on jumps - control your speed
Lean backward before landing to avoid crashing
Some levels have shortcuts - look for alternative paths

faq.question: How many levels does Moto X3M have?
faq.answer: Moto X3M features 22 challenging levels with increasing difficulty.

title: 1v1.LOL
description: 1v1.LOL is a competitive third-person shooter where you can build structures while fighting. Practice your aim, build defensive walls, and outsmart your opponent in intense 1v1 battles.
howToPlay: Use WASD to move, mouse to aim and shoot. Press building keys to place walls, ramps, and platforms. Combine building and shooting to win.

description: 2048 is the viral puzzle game that took the world by storm. Slide numbered tiles to combine them, doubling their value each time. Reach the 2048 tile to win, then keep going for higher scores!
howToPlay: Use arrow keys to slide all tiles in that direction. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one with double the value. Reach 2048!
tips: Keep your highest tile in a corner
Never move in the direction that would dislodge your corner tile
Build a chain of decreasing values along one edge
Think ahead - every move affects all tiles

faq.question: How do I win 2048?
faq.answer: Combine tiles until you create a 2048 tile. The key strategy is to keep your highest tile in a corner and build a descending chain.

faq.question: What happens after I reach 2048?
faq.answer: You can continue playing to reach higher tiles like 4096, 8192, and beyond. The game ends when no more moves are possible.

title: Hangman
description: Hangman is the classic word guessing game reimagined for the browser. Guess letters to reveal the hidden word before the stick figure is complete. With thousands of words across multiple categories, it's perfect for vocabulary building and quick brain teasers.
howToPlay: Guess letters by clicking them or typing on your keyboard. Each wrong guess adds a body part to the hangman. Reveal the full word before the figure is complete to win!
tips: Start with vowels - E, A, I, O, U appear in most words
Common consonants like R, S, T, L, N are good second guesses
Look at word length to narrow down possibilities
If you see a pattern like _ i g h t, think 'right', 'light', 'night'

faq.question: Is Hangman good for learning?
faq.answer: Yes! Hangman helps build vocabulary and spelling skills while being fun. It's great for English learners and kids.

faq.question: How many wrong guesses do I get?
faq.answer: Traditionally you get 6 wrong guesses (head, body, 2 arms, 2 legs) before the game ends.
